query_normalized: developing a sustainable solar-powered hydrogen fuel production system energy
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by providing a specific technical implementation of a "solar-powered hydrogen fuel production system" using photoelectrochemical (PEC) water splitting, which satisfies acceptance criteria (a) for measuring the same biological/physical mechanism and (b) for addressing the independent variable (solar energy) and dependent variable (hydrogen production) within the user's domain.
